name: Jester
ability: If you are executed after voting on yourself & claim Jester, all other players of your alignment switch & your team wins.

otherNightReminder: Send fake night cards as you want to players who were disruptive, broke madness or to anyone after an evil player is executed & dies.
name: Hypnotist
ability: Each night*, players might recieve false night cards if they are disruptive in town, break madness, or after an evil player is executed & dies.
flavor: Town is towning so hard right now -Nic

firstNightReminder: They choose a player. Deaths each night are arbitrary.
otherNightReminder: They choose a player. Deaths each night are arbitrary.
name: Unfathomable
ability: Each night, you may choose a player to guide the ST's decisions. Deaths each night are arbitrary.
flavor: Your destiny is held firm no longer.
